calendarFaqs.q: How can I add Fresno Unified School District's school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: To add the Fresno Unified School District 2025-2026 calendar to Google Calendar, download the .ics file from this page, then open Google Calendar, go to Settings → Import & Export → Import, and upload the file. All school holidays, breaks, and key dates will appear on your calendar automatically.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Fresno Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Fresno Unified School District is Monday, August 18, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Fresno Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Fresno Unified School District is Thursday, June 11, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Fresno Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Fresno Unified School District runs Mar 30, 2026–Apr 6, 2026, 8 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Fresno Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Fresno Unified School District runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 9, 2026, 19 days. School resumes Jan 12, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs March 30–April 6, an 8-day break compared to the standard 5-day break offered by most California districts.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs Dec 22–Jan 9 (19 days), school not resuming until January 12 — one of the longest winter breaks among California unified districts.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Birthday
yearNumbers.detail: Fresno Unified observes Lincoln's Birthday as a separate school holiday on February 9, in addition to Presidents' Day — two no-school Mondays one week apart in February.

calendarNotes:
Fresno Unified begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 18, 2025 — earlier than most California districts, allowing the year to conclude before June's peak valley heat. Spring Break runs March 30–April 6, 2026. The school year ends June 11, 2026. Families relocating from districts that start after Labor Day should plan enrollment, childcare, and back-to-school shopping before mid-August.

The calendar includes California-specific no-school days — Lincoln's Birthday and Cesar Chavez Day — along with District Buyback Days when teachers attend professional development and students do not attend. The major multi-day breaks are Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break; Fresno Unified does not have a Fall Break.
